big_problem: Lab Pro gates still feel like errors — dynasty-comps falls back to generic DEFAULT_ROWS on the blur preview.
epic: Lab L4 — Pro upgrade gates feel like upgrade, not error
slice_title: Dynasty comps Pro gate bespoke comp-tier teaser rows + Hawkeye pitch
acceptance_ref: T6 screenshot gravity — Pro gate shows comp-tier preview
acceptance_commands: node --input-type=module -e "import { teaserRowsForPanel, upgradePitchForPanel } from './apps/web/lib/panel-upgrade-teaser.ts'; const r=teaserRowsForPanel('dynasty-comps'); if(r.length!==3||!r[0].detail.includes('Comp')) throw new Error('bad rows'); const p=upgradePitchForPanel('dynasty-comps','Hawkeye'); if(!p.includes('comp')) throw new Error('bad pitch'); console.log('OK', r[0].name);"
